description_for_model: Help users find jobs based on real financial outcomes (net income after taxes and commute) and Job Happiness Index (JHI). Analyze work reality, compare offers by actual 'take-home' value, and find skill-first matches in Nordic and Central European markets.
description_for_human: JobShaman reveals the true financial and happiness reality of job offers. No CV spam, just signals that matter.

capabilities.financial_analysis: Calculates net income after taxes and commute costs for multiple EU countries.
capabilities.happiness_index: Ranks jobs by the Job Happiness Index (JHI) based on skills and environment resonance.
capabilities.handshake_dialogue: Enables direct skill-first dialogue between candidates and companies.
